text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I stretch for five minutes, then take a quick shower and have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and coffee. My work starts at 9 a.m., and I usually focus on meetings and project tasks until noon. After lunch, I take a 30-minute walk or do some light stretching. In the evening, I cook dinner, read a book or watch a show, and always go to bed by 10:30 p.m. This routine helps me feel balanced and productive throughout the week.
